name: Pate in Crust 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Make pastry and set aside.
2. Marinate chicken in 2 ounces brandy for 2 or 3 hours.
3. In a small bowl, thoroughly mix ground pork, 2 ounces brandy, salt, and pepper.
4. Roll 3/4 of pastry dough to 1/8 inch thick on a floured wooden board.
5. Line the bottom and sides of a loaf pan with the rolled pastry shell. There should be about 1/2 inch of extra dough on top of the sides.
6. Layer half of pork at the bottom of the pan, then layer all of chicken and pour marinade on top.
7. Next, layer all of sliced ham, then cover ham with the rest of pork.
8. Roll remainder of pastry to 1/8 inch thick and cover the top of the pan.
9. Crimp edges to seal.
10. Beat 1 egg and brush the top of the pastry with it.
